title: turbinicarpus subterraneus subsp. booleanus
intro: Turbinicarpus subterraneus subsp. booleanus is a rare and endemic subspecies of cactus, native to Mexico, characterized by its globular stem and fine, woolly spines. The medicinal properties of this plant include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Turbinicarpus subterraneus subsp. booleanus may include its ability to stimulate the immune system and protect against oxidative stress, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and powdered to make a tea or capsule, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
